/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/SoftGPU.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o bin/SoftGPU  src/platform/libplatform.a src/stages/libstages.a src/pipeline/libpipeline.a src/test/libtest.a extern/glad/libglad.a extern/imgui/libimgui.a /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so src/utils/libutils.a src/profiler/libprofiler.a extern/imgui/libimgui.a src/stages/libstages.a src/core/libcore.a _deps/glm-build/glm/libglm.a /usr/lib64/libglfw.so.3.3
